title: ToolTreaux 4oz Ball Peen Hammer with Hardwood Handle, Small Engineers Hammer
description:
Compact and easy to control, this 4oz ball peen hammer is ideal for precision metalworking, jewelry making, riveting, copper shaping, gasket work and detailed bench tasks. The dual-head design includes a flat striking face for light hammering and a rounded peen end for shaping, doming and texturing soft metals. Measuring 10" overall, this lightweight machinist hammer offers excellent balance for controlled impact work, while the hardwood handle provides a comfortable, traditional grip for workshop, hobby and craft applications.

Compact and easy to control, this 4oz ball peen hammer is ideal for precision metalworking, jewelry making, riveting, copper shaping, gasket work and detailed bench tasks. The dual-head design includes a flat striking face for light hammering and a rounded peen end for shaping, doming and texturing soft metals. Measuring 10" overall, this lightweight machinist hammer offers excellent balance for controlled impact work, while the hardwood handle provides a comfortable, traditional grip for workshop, hobby and craft applications.
Key Features
  • 4OZ BALL PEEN HAMMER: Lightweight engineer’s hammer designed for precision metalworking, jewelry making, riveting, copper shaping, small repairs and more; also referred to as a machinists or engineers hammer
  • FLAT FACE AND ROUNDED PEEN END: Flat striking face is ideal for light hammering, flattening and striking small punches, while the rounded ball peen end helps shape, dome, curve and texture soft metals
  • IDEAL FOR RIVETS GASKETS AND METAL FORMING: Use for setting rivets, shaping copper, working with gaskets, forming soft metal, crafting hobby repairs and light machinist applications
  • COMPACT SIZE FOR CONTROL: 4oz hammer design is easier to maneuver than larger hammers, making it a practical choice for delicate tasks and detailed projects
  • 10 INCH HARDWOOD HANDLE: Classic wood handle offers a comfortable grip and balanced feel, while the compact size makes this ball pein hammer easy to store in a toolbox, workbench drawer or craft kit
Specifications
MPN: TTX-H49DLG62
UPC: 810131707217
Hammer Head Weight: 4oz
Handle Length: 10"
Handle Material: Wood
Hammer Head Material: Stainless Steel
Designed for precision, balance and control, this 4oz ball peen hammer is a compact metalworking tool made for detailed bench work, light duty shaping and small project applications. Also known as a ball pein hammer, engineer’s hammer or machinist hammer, this style of hammer is commonly used for forming metal, setting rivets, shaping copper, working with gaskets and handling a variety of craft, hobby and workshop tasks, where a larger hammer may feel too heavy or difficult to control.

The dual head design gives this small ball peen hammer added versatility for different types of metalworking and repair projects. One side features a flat striking face that can be used for light hammering, flattening, controlled impact work and striking small punches or light duty chisels. The opposite side features the traditional rounded ball peen end, which is useful for shaping, doming, curving, peening and texturing soft metals. This makes it a practical choice for jewelry making, riveting, copper forming small machinist work and general detail focused applications.

With its lightweight 4oz design and 10 inch overall length, this hammer is easy to maneuver and well suited for precision tasks that require a careful hand. The smaller size helps provide better control during repetitive work and allows users to apply targeted force without the bulk of a full size hammer. Whether you are setting small rivets, forming soft metal, shaping copper, making jewelry, working on gaskets or completing detailed repairs at the bench, this compact engineer’s hammer offers the control needed for accurate results.

The hardwood handle provides a classic feel with a comfortable grip, making it suitable for use at a craft table, jewelry making station, machinist bench, garage workspace or home workshop. Durable, simple and versatile, this 4oz ball peen hammer is a useful addition to any tool kit for makers, hobbyists, jewelers, machinists, metalworkers and DIY users who need a smaller hammer for controlled striking and detailed metal shaping projects.
